text:
Clinical Groups The Primary Reason for the Home Health Encounter is to 
Provide: 

Musculoskeletal Rehabilitation Therapy (physical, occupational or speech) for a musculoskeletal 
condition 

Neuro/Stroke Rehabilitation Therapy (physical, occupational or speech) for a neurological 
condition or stroke 

Wounds – Post-Op Wound Aftercare and 
Skin/Non-Surgical Wound Care 
 Assessment, treatment & evaluation of a surgical wound(s); 
assessment, treatment & evaluation of non-surgical wounds,
